tEn: De novo design of high-affinity protein binders with AlphaProteo
tZh: 利用AlphaProteo从头设计高亲和力蛋白结合物
sEn: AlphaProteo achieves 3- to 300-fold better binding affinities than existing methods for de novo protein binder design.
sZh: AlphaProteo在从头设计蛋白结合物方面，结合亲和力比现有方法高出3到300倍。
absEn: Computational design of protein-binding proteins is a fundamental capability with broad utility in biomedical research and biotechnology. Recent methods have made strides against some target proteins, but on-demand creation of high-affinity binders without multiple rounds of experimental testing remains an unsolved challenge. This technical report introduces AlphaProteo, a family of machine learning models for protein design, and details its performance on the de novo binder design problem. With AlphaProteo, we achieve 3- to 300-fold better binding affinities and higher experimental success rates than the best existing methods on seven target proteins. Our results suggest that AlphaProteo can generate binders "ready-to-use" for many research applications using only one round of medium-throughput screening and no further optimization.
absZh: 计算设计蛋白结合蛋白是一项基础能力，在生物医学研究和生物技术中具有广泛用途。近期方法在针对某些靶蛋白方面取得了进展，但无需多轮实验测试即可按需创建高亲和力结合物仍是一个未解决的挑战。本技术报告介绍了AlphaProteo，一个用于蛋白质设计的机器学习模型家族，并详细阐述了其在从头设计结合物问题上的表现。利用AlphaProteo，我们在七个靶蛋白上实现了比现有最佳方法高出3到300倍的结合亲和力以及更高的实验成功率。我们的结果表明，AlphaProteo能够生成“即用型”结合物，仅需一轮中等通量筛选且无需进一步优化，即可用于许多研究应用。

contrib.en: Introduces AlphaProteo, a family of ML models for de novo protein binder design.
contrib.zh: 提出AlphaProteo，一个用于从头设计蛋白质结合体的机器学习模型家族。

contrib.en: Achieves 3- to 300-fold better binding affinities than existing methods on seven targets.
contrib.zh: 在七个靶标上实现比现有方法高3到300倍的结合亲和力。

contrib.en: Demonstrates high experimental success rates (9%-88%) with only one round of medium-throughput screening.
contrib.zh: 仅通过一轮中等通量筛选即展示出高实验成功率（9%-88%）。

contrib.en: Obtains sub-nanomolar to low-nanomolar binders without affinity optimization for most targets.
contrib.zh: 对大多数靶标无需亲和力优化即获得亚纳摩尔至低纳摩尔级别的结合体。

contrib.en: Validates biological activity: inhibition of VEGF signaling and SARS-CoV-2 neutralization.
contrib.zh: 验证生物学活性：抑制VEGF信号传导和中和SARS-CoV-2。

contrib.en: Confirms designed structures via cryo-EM and X-ray crystallography with high accuracy.
contrib.zh: 通过冷冻电镜和X射线晶体学高精度确认设计结构。

limits.en: Validated on only eight target proteins; generalization to broader targets needs further testing.
limits.zh: 仅在八个靶标蛋白上验证；对更广泛靶标的泛化性需进一步测试。

limits.en: Failed to obtain binders for one challenging target (TNFα) due to flat polar binding site.
limits.zh: 由于平坦极性结合位点，未能获得一个挑战性靶标（TNFα）的结合体。

limits.en: Requires target crystal structure as input; limited for targets without experimental structures.
limits.zh: 需要靶标晶体结构作为输入；对缺乏实验结构的靶标有限制。

limits.en: Machine learning methods not disclosed due to biosecurity and commercial considerations.
limits.zh: 由于生物安全和商业考虑，未公开机器学习方法。

limits.en: Binders designed for research use only, not for clinical applications.
limits.zh: 结合体仅设计用于研究用途，不用于临床应用。

items.en: send correspondence regarding this report to alphaproteo@google.com.
items.zh: 关于本报告的通信请发送至 alphaproteo@google.com。

items.en: Computational design of protein-binding proteins is a fundamental capability with broad utility in biomedical research and biotechnology. Recent methods have made strides against some target proteins, but on-demand creation of high-affinity binders without multiple rounds of experimental testing remains an unsolved challenge. This technical report introduces AlphaProteo, a family of machine learning models for protein design, and details its performance on the de novo binder design problem. With AlphaProteo, we achieve 3- to 300-fold better binding affinities and higher experimental success rates than the best existing methods on seven target proteins. Our results suggest that AlphaProteo can generate binders "ready-to-use" for many research applications using only one round of medium-throughput screening and no further optimization.
items.zh: 蛋白质结合蛋白的计算设计是一项基础能力，在生物医学研究和生物技术中具有广泛用途。近期方法在针对某些靶点蛋白方面取得了进展，但无需多轮实验测试即可按需生成高亲和力结合体仍是一个未解决的挑战。本技术报告介绍了 AlphaProteo，一个用于蛋白质设计的机器学习模型系列，并详细阐述了其在从头结合体设计问题上的性能。借助 AlphaProteo，我们在七个靶点蛋白上实现了比现有最佳方法高 3 到 300 倍的结合亲和力和更高的实验成功率。我们的结果表明，AlphaProteo 能够仅通过一轮中等通量筛选且无需进一步优化，即可为许多研究应用生成“即用型”结合体。

items.en: We introduce the AlphaProteo protein design system and experimentally test binders designed against eight structurally diverse target proteins.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 AlphaProteo 蛋白质设计系统，并实验测试了针对八个结构多样的靶点蛋白设计的结合体。

items.en: For seven of the targets, between 9% and 88% of the designs tested in the wet lab were experimentally verified as successful binders. These figures are higher than the best existing method and 5- to 100-fold higher than other methods. For one of these targets we report the first computationally designed binders.
items.zh: 对于其中七个靶点，湿实验测试的设计中有 9% 到 88% 被实验验证为成功结合体。这些数字高于现有最佳方法，并且是其他方法的 5 到 100 倍。对于其中一个靶点，我们报告了首个计算设计的结合体。

items.en: The in silico performance of AlphaProteo on hundreds of target proteins from the PDB is comparable to these seven targets, suggesting that the method can potentially generalize widely. We chose one of the most challenging targets from this PDB screen as an 8th target but failed to obtain binders.
items.zh: AlphaProteo 在来自 PDB 的数百个靶点蛋白上的计算机模拟性能与这七个靶点相当，表明该方法可能具有广泛的泛化能力。我们从这次 PDB 筛选中选择了一个最具挑战性的靶点作为第八个靶点，但未能获得结合体。

items.en: We obtain binders with 80-960 picomolar affinities to four targets and low-nanomolar affinities to another three without needing high-throughput screening or experimental affinity optimization. For the seven targets, our designs have 3- to 300-fold better binding affinities than the best previous designed binder.
items.zh: 我们获得了针对四个靶点的亲和力为 80-960 皮摩尔的结合体，以及另外三个靶点的低纳摩尔亲和力结合体，无需高通量筛选或实验亲和力优化。对于这七个靶点，我们的设计比之前最佳设计的结合体具有高 3 到 300 倍的结合亲和力。

items.en: We test binders for two of our targets for biological function, demonstrating inhibition of VEGF signaling in human cells and SARS-CoV-2 neutralisation in Vero monkey cells.
items.zh: 我们测试了针对两个靶点的结合体的生物学功能，证明了在人类细胞中抑制 VEGF 信号传导以及在 Vero 猴细胞中中和 SARS-CoV-2 的能力。

items.en: Cryo-EM and X-ray crystallography confirm the designed binder and binder-target complex structures.
items.zh: 冷冻电镜和 X 射线晶体学证实了设计的结合体及结合体-靶点复合物的结构。

items.en: Protein-protein interaction is a fundamental aspect of protein function, and protein-binding proteins are a basic building block for therapeutics, diagnostics, and biomedical research [19, 29]. Traditionally, antibodies, nanobodies, and other scaffolds such as DARPins are developed into binders against a wide range of targets by immunization or directed evolution [36, 33, 12]. However, experimental selection does not afford control over the target epitope and is often too laborious for routine research applications. Computational design of binders de novo, without using a natural protein as a starting point, can target pre-specified epitopes and generate binders that are smaller, more thermostable, and easier to express than antibodies [10, 39, 51].
items.zh: 蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用是蛋白质功能的基本方面，蛋白质结合蛋白是治疗、诊断和生物医学研究的基本构建模块 [19, 29]。传统上，抗体、纳米抗体和其他支架如 DARPins 通过免疫或定向进化被开发成针对广泛靶点的结合体 [36, 33, 12]。然而，实验选择无法控制靶点表位，并且对于常规研究应用来说往往过于费力。从头计算设计结合体，无需使用天然蛋白质作为起点，可以靶向预先指定的表位，并生成比抗体更小、更热稳定且更易表达的结合体 [10, 39, 51]。

items.en: Recently, deep-learning based models have achieved major advances in biomolecular structure prediction [21, 2, 28, 24, 46] and protein design [18, 73, 37, 14, 7, 34]. This has enabled progress on key scientific and societal challenges [22], including the prediction and design of protein-protein interactions [9, 17, 4, 73, 11, 13, 53]. It is now possible to obtain computationally designed binders to some targets without high-throughput screening [73, 13, 11]. High binding affinity without experimental optimization has also been achieved in some cases, such as for small peptides or disordered targets [41, 44]. However, success rates remain low against convex or polar epitopes, the affinity of the initial designs is usually poor, and many targets remain intractable [45, 3].
items.zh: 最近，基于深度学习的模型在生物分子结构预测 [21, 2, 28, 24, 46] 和蛋白质设计 [18, 73, 37, 14, 7, 34] 方面取得了重大进展。这推动了关键科学和社会挑战的进展 [22]，包括蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用的预测和设计 [9, 17, 4, 73, 11, 13, 53]。现在，无需高通量筛选即可获得针对某些靶点的计算设计结合体 [73, 13, 11]。在某些情况下，例如针对小肽或无序靶点，也实现了无需实验优化的高结合亲和力 [41, 44]。然而，针对凸面或极性表位的成功率仍然较低，初始设计的亲和力通常较差，并且许多靶点仍然难以处理 [45, 3]。

items.en: In this technical report focusing solely on experimental validation, we present the AlphaProteo protein design system and show that it can design de novo protein-binding proteins with the following advantages:
items.zh: 在本技术报告中，我们专注于实验验证，介绍了 AlphaProteo 蛋白质设计系统，并展示了其能够设计从头蛋白质结合蛋白，具有以下优势：

items.en: High success rate: stable, highly expressed, and specific binders can be obtained from screening tens of design candidates, alleviating the need for high-throughput methods.
items.zh: 高成功率：通过筛选数十个设计候选物即可获得稳定、高表达且特异的结合体，减轻了对高通量方法的需求。

items.en: High affinity: for every target tested except one, the best binders have sub-nanomolar or low-nanomolar binding affinity (KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}}), minimizing the labor needed for downstream affinity optimization.
items.zh: 高亲和力：对于除一个外的所有测试靶点，最佳结合体具有亚纳摩尔或低纳摩尔的结合亲和力（KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}}），最小化了后续亲和力优化的工作量。

items.en: General: binders are successfully obtained against a range of targets with diverse structural and biochemical properties, using a single design method without complex manual intervention.
items.zh: 通用性：使用单一设计方法，无需复杂的人工干预，即可成功获得针对一系列具有不同结构和生化特性的靶点的结合体。

items.en: AlphaProteo comprises two components (Figure 1): a generative model trained on structure and sequence data from the Protein Data Bank (PDB) and a distillation set of AlphaFold predictions, as well as a filter which scores generated designs to predict whether they will succeed experimentally. To design binders, we input a structure of the "target" protein and optionally designate "hotspot" residues representing the target epitope; the generative model outputs a structure and sequence of a candidate binder for that target (Figure 1). We generate a large number of design candidates and then filter them to a smaller set prior to experimental testing. The generative model compares favorably to the best existing method on in silico benchmarks (Figure S1, Section S2).
items.zh: AlphaProteo 包含两个组件（图 1）：一个在蛋白质数据库（PDB）的结构和序列数据以及 AlphaFold 预测的蒸馏集上训练的生成模型，以及一个过滤器，用于对生成的设计进行评分以预测它们是否会在实验中成功。为了设计结合体，我们输入靶点蛋白的结构，并可选地指定代表靶点表位的“热点”残基；生成模型输出该靶点的候选结合体的结构和序列（图 1）。我们生成大量设计候选物，然后在实验测试前将其过滤到较小的集合。在计算机模拟基准测试中，生成模型优于现有最佳方法（图 S1，第 S2 节）。

full.secZh: 2.1 中通量筛选获得亚纳摩尔亲和力结合剂

items.en: To validate AlphaProteo experimentally, we designed binders against eight target proteins with diverse structural properties, of which two are viral proteins involved in infection and six are therapeutically important human proteins (Figure 1, Table S1):
items.zh: 为了实验验证 AlphaProteo，我们针对八个具有不同结构特性的靶点蛋白设计了结合体，其中两个是参与感染的病毒蛋白，六个是治疗上重要的人类蛋白（图 1，表 S1）：

items.en: BHRF1, an oncogenic protein from Epstein-Barr virus; inhibition via binding can kill cancer cells and slow tumor growth [66]. It has a hydrophobic groove that perfectly accommodates a helix on its binding partner, facilitating binding.
items.zh: BHRF1，一种来自 Epstein-Barr 病毒的致癌蛋白；通过结合抑制可以杀死癌细胞并减缓肿瘤生长 [66]。它有一个疏水沟槽，完美容纳其结合伴侣上的螺旋，从而促进结合。

items.en: SARS-CoV-2 spike protein receptor-binding domain (SC2RBD), a protein domain required for COVID-19 infection. We targeted its interface to the human ACE2 receptor as disrupting this interaction is known to block SARS-CoV-2 from infecting human cells [42]. Previous design efforts have succeeded against this polar and convex site but required experimental optimization to achieve high affinity [50, 11].
items.zh: SARS-CoV-2 刺突蛋白受体结合域（SC2RBD），一种 COVID-19 感染所需的蛋白结构域。我们靶向其与人类 ACE2 受体的界面，因为破坏这种相互作用已知可以阻止 SARS-CoV-2 感染人类细胞 [42]。先前的设计工作已成功针对这个极性和凸面位点，但需要实验优化才能实现高亲和力 [50, 11]。

items.en: Interleukin-7 Receptor-α𝛼\alpha (IL-7RA), a cell-surface receptor involved in lymphocyte development and a therapeutic target for acute lymphoblastic leukemia and HIV. We targeted the binding site of the native interleukin-7 ligand, which is moderately hydrophobic and subject to high success rates in previous design efforts [51, 73].
items.zh: 白细胞介素-7 受体-α（IL-7RA），一种参与淋巴细胞发育的细胞表面受体，是急性淋巴细胞白血病和 HIV 的治疗靶点。我们靶向天然白细胞介素-7 配体的结合位点，该位点中等疏水，在先前的设计工作中成功率较高 [51, 73]。

items.en: Programmed Death-Ligand 1 (PD-L1), a cell-surface receptor that controls immune cell proliferation and is an important therapeutic target for cancer. The target site is flat and difficult to bind by small molecules and smaller proteins [11, 45].
items.zh: 程序性死亡配体 1（PD-L1），一种控制免疫细胞增殖的细胞表面受体，是癌症的重要治疗靶点。靶点位点平坦，难以被小分子和较小蛋白质结合 [11, 45]。

items.en: Tropomyosin Receptor Kinase A (TrkA), a nerve growth factor receptor involved in autoimmune disease and an analgesic target for treating chronic pain. We targeted a hydrophobic pocket addressed by previous design efforts. Previous binding affinities were poor without experimental optimization [51].
items.zh: 原肌球蛋白受体激酶A（TrkA），一种参与自身免疫性疾病的神经生长因子受体，也是治疗慢性疼痛的镇痛靶点。我们针对先前设计工作所涉及的一个疏水口袋。先前的结合亲和力未经实验优化时较差[51]。

items.en: Interleukin-17A (IL-17A), a secreted protein that triggers inflammation and a therapeutic target in autoimmune disease. We targeted the interface of IL-17A with its native receptor, which comprises two chains of a homodimer and has a large polar pocket. Existing designed binders to IL-17A have poor unoptimized affinities and required screening large libraries to obtain [3].
items.zh: 白细胞介素-17A（IL-17A），一种触发炎症的分泌蛋白，是自身免疫性疾病的治疗靶点。我们针对IL-17A与其天然受体的界面，该界面由同源二聚体的两条链组成，并有一个大的极性口袋。现有的IL-17A设计结合物未经优化时亲和力较差，且需要通过筛选大型文库获得[3]。

items.en: Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor A (VEGF-A), a secreted growth factor controlling angiogenesis and a therapeutic target for cancer and diabetic retinopathy. We targeted a small hydrophobic patch bound by the native VEGF receptor [32]. No designed binders to this target have been published despite its biomedical importance.
items.zh: 血管内皮生长因子A（VEGF-A），一种控制血管生成的分泌生长因子，是癌症和糖尿病视网膜病变的治疗靶点。我们针对天然VEGF受体结合的一个小疏水补丁[32]。尽管其具有生物医学重要性，但尚未有该靶点的设计结合物发表。

items.en: Tumor Necrosis Factor Alpha (TNFα𝛼\alpha), a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced during inflammation and a therapeutic target for inflammatory disease [16, 31, 30]. We targeted a polar region between two subunits of the TNFα𝛼\alpha homotrimer where it interacts with the native TNF receptor. No computationally designed binders against this target have been reported.
items.zh: 肿瘤坏死因子α（TNFα），一种在炎症过程中产生的促炎细胞因子，是炎症性疾病的治疗靶点[16, 31, 30]。我们针对TNFα同源三聚体两个亚基之间的极性区域，该区域与天然TNF受体相互作用。尚未有报道针对该靶点的计算设计结合物。

items.en: We chose the above targets for their biological importance, to span a range of design problem difficulty, and to allow comparison to existing design methods. To compare to RFdiffusion [73], we selected the target where it had the highest experimental success rate (IL-7RA) and the two targets where it had the lowest (PD-L1, TrkA), omitting the other 2 tested targets to conserve our experimental bandwidth. We chose BHRF1 and SC2RBD as an additional easy and difficult target, respectively, which have precedent in the computational design literature. IL-17A and VEGF-A were selected as difficult targets that had no confirmed computationally designed binders at the time of the work. After experimental testing on the above 7 targets was completed, TNFα𝛼\alpha was chosen as an 8th very difficult target based on in silico analysis (Section 2.1.1, Section S3). No additional targets beyond these 8 were experimentally evaluated during the course of this work.
items.zh: 我们选择上述靶点是因为其生物学重要性、涵盖一系列设计问题难度，并允许与现有设计方法进行比较。为了与RFdiffusion[73]比较，我们选择了其实验成功率最高的靶点（IL-7RA）和两个成功率最低的靶点（PD-L1、TrkA），省略了其他两个测试靶点以节省实验带宽。我们选择BHRF1和SC2RBD分别作为额外的简单和困难靶点，这些靶点在计算设计文献中有先例。IL-17A和VEGF-A被选为困难靶点，在开展工作时尚未有确认的计算设计结合物。在对上述7个靶点完成实验测试后，基于计算机分析（第2.1.1节，第S3节），选择TNFα作为第8个非常困难的靶点。在本工作过程中，除这8个靶点外，没有对其他靶点进行实验评估。

items.en: For each target, we generated a large set of in silico designs 50-140 amino acids long (Table S1) and used an automated filtering procedure to choose between 47 and 172 binder candidates to test for binding by yeast surface display. We tested designs for the initial set of seven targets and observed experimental success rates, or the fraction of designs with measurable binding (Section S1.2), ranging from 9%, on TrkA, to 88%, on BHRF1 (Table 1). Per-target success rates were >5% for 7 targets, >10% for 6 targets and >20% for 5 targets (Figure 1, Table 1).
items.zh: 对于每个靶点，我们生成了大量长度为50-140个氨基酸的计算机设计（表S1），并使用自动过滤程序选择47到172个候选结合物，通过酵母表面展示测试结合。我们测试了最初七个靶点的设计，观察到实验成功率（即可测量结合的设计比例，第S1.2节）从TrkA的9%到BHRF1的88%不等（表1）。7个靶点的每个靶点成功率>5%，6个靶点>10%，5个靶点>20%（图1，表1）。

items.en: Our success rates are higher than the best alternative current method on 7 targets (Figure 2, Table 1). On VEGF-A, AlphaProteo is the first computational design method, to our knowledge, to obtain successful binders, although antibodies have been developed using traditional methods [27]. On BHRF1, SC2RBD, and IL-17A, AlphaProteo has, respectively, 5-, 8-, and 700-fold higher success rates than the next-best method (Figure 1, Table 1).
items.zh: 我们的成功率在7个靶点上高于当前最佳替代方法（图2，表1）。在VEGF-A上，据我们所知，AlphaProteo是第一个获得成功结合物的计算设计方法，尽管已有使用传统方法开发的抗体[27]。在BHRF1、SC2RBD和IL-17A上，AlphaProteo的成功率分别比次优方法高5倍、8倍和700倍（图1，表1）。

items.en: To compare AlphaProteo quantitatively to RFdiffusion [73], the current state-of-the-art (SoTA) binder design method, we tested published RFdiffusion binder designs for IL-7RA, PD-L1, and TrkA alongside AlphaProteo designs in the same yeast display assay (Section S4). In this direct comparison, AlphaProteo had higher overall experimental success rates on all three targets (Figure 1, Table 1). These results indicate that AlphaProteo is strongly competitive to SoTA in terms of success rates.
items.zh: 为了将AlphaProteo与当前最先进的结合物设计方法RFdiffusion[73]进行定量比较，我们在相同的酵母展示实验中测试了已发表的RFdiffusion针对IL-7RA、PD-L1和TrkA的设计结合物以及AlphaProteo的设计（第S4节）。在这种直接比较中，AlphaProteo在所有三个靶点上的总体实验成功率更高（图1，表1）。这些结果表明，AlphaProteo在成功率方面与最先进方法具有很强的竞争力。

items.en: We note that SC2RBD, PD-L1, and TrkA were used to develop AlphaProteo (Section S2), so these success rates may overestimate performance on novel targets. However, for BHRF1, IL-7RA, VEGF-A, and IL-17A, we only performed a single round of medium-throughput testing, showing that high success rates can be obtained prospectively for even quite challenging targets.
items.zh: 我们注意到，SC2RBD、PD-L1和TrkA被用于开发AlphaProteo（第S2节），因此这些成功率可能高估了在新靶点上的表现。然而，对于BHRF1、IL-7RA、VEGF-A和IL-17A，我们只进行了一轮中等通量测试，表明即使是相当具有挑战性的靶点，也可以前瞻性地获得高成功率。

items.en: After obtaining results on these seven targets, we investigated the potential target range of AlphaProteo by computing its in silico success rate for 3 epitopes on each of 200 randomly selected target proteins from the PDB (Section S3). The above 7 targets spanned a similar range of in silico success rate as this wider list of targets, confirming that they are representative of the difficulty of most potential targets. The screening also identified several particularly challenging targets, including TNFα𝛼\alpha, with in silico success rates very close to 0. Given TNFα𝛼\alpha’s unusual in silico difficulty and high biomedical importance, we designed and experimentally tested binders to this target, but failed to obtain hits. This is consistent with the low in silico performance on this target, and is likely due to a flat, highly polar binding site at an interface between 2 subunits in a homotrimer. Encouragingly, however, 80% of the sampled PDB targets have higher in silico success rates than the most difficult target where we successfully obtained binders, IL-17A (Figure S2). This suggests that AlphaProteo can generalize to a wide range of biologically important binder design problems.
items.zh: 在获得这七个靶点的结果后，我们通过计算AlphaProteo在从PDB中随机选择的200个靶点蛋白上每个靶点3个表位的计算机成功率，研究了AlphaProteo的潜在靶点范围（第S3节）。上述7个靶点的计算机成功率范围与这个更广泛的靶点列表相似，证实了它们代表了大多数潜在靶点的难度。筛选还识别出几个特别具有挑战性的靶点，包括TNFα，其计算机成功率非常接近0。鉴于TNFα异常的计算机难度和高生物医学重要性，我们设计并实验测试了针对该靶点的结合物，但未能获得命中。这与该靶点的低计算机性能一致，可能归因于同源三聚体中两个亚基之间界面上的一个平坦、高度极性的结合位点。然而，令人鼓舞的是，80%的采样PDB靶点具有比我们成功获得结合物的最困难靶点IL-17A更高的计算机成功率（图S2）。这表明AlphaProteo可以推广到广泛的生物学重要的结合物设计问题。

items.en: High experimental success rates can reduce the labor and cost of obtaining binders, but once hits have been found, a far more important metric is binding affinity (KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}}) to the target. Most therapeutic antibodies have low-picomolar KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values [15, 40], which is achieved by many rounds of experimental affinity maturation. For binders used as research tools, low-nanomolar KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values or better are also typical [26]. To measure how strongly our designed binders bound their target, we recombinantly expressed and purified yeast screening hits in E. coli to measure their KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values in vitro. Overall, 93% of designs chosen for follow up successfully expressed in E. coli (Table S3), and the majority were monodisperse by size-exclusion chromatography (Figure S4). A subset of designs assayed by circular dichroism (CD) spectroscopy all exhibited the expected secondary structures (Figure 2, Figure S5). Furthermore, the designs exhibited partial or no unfolding up to 95°C in CD thermal melts, indicating that they are extremely thermally stable with TmsubscriptTm\mathrm{T_{m}} values > 95 °C (Figure S5). For the recombinantly produced designs, we measured KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values using a homogeneous time-resolved fluorescence (HTRF) equilibrium saturation binding assay (Section S1.4).
items.zh: 高实验成功率可以减少获得结合物的劳动和成本，但一旦找到命中，更重要的指标是与靶点的结合亲和力（KD）。大多数治疗性抗体具有低皮摩尔KD值[15, 40]，这是通过多轮实验亲和力成熟实现的。对于用作研究工具的结合物，低纳摩尔KD值或更好也是典型的[26]。为了测量我们设计的结合物与其靶点的结合强度，我们在大肠杆菌中重组表达和纯化酵母筛选命中物，以测量其体外KD值。总体而言，93%选择进行后续实验的设计成功在大肠杆菌中表达（表S3），并且大多数通过尺寸排阻色谱呈单分散性（图S4）。通过圆二色光谱（CD）测定的一部分设计均表现出预期的二级结构（图2，图S5）。此外，这些设计在CD热熔解中直到95°C部分或完全不展开，表明它们具有极高的热稳定性，Tm值>95°C（图S5）。对于重组生产的设计，我们使用均相时间分辨荧光（HTRF）平衡饱和结合实验测量了KD值（第S1.4节）。

items.en: AlphaProteo’s best per-target KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values were <1 nM for 4 targets, <10 nM for 6 targets, and <30 nM for 7 targets (Figure 1, Table 1, Figure S3). The best KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} overall was 82 pM, for the design IL7RA_70 (Table S7, Figure S6). We identified 9 total binders with sub-nanomolar KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values: 4 for IL-7RA, 2 for PD-L1, 1 for TrkA, and 2 for VEGF-A (Table S7). Compared to the best unoptimized binders from other design methods, AlphaProteo KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values were better on all targets, by margins of 7-, 4-, 37-, 5-, 380-, and 5-fold, for BHRF1, SC2RBD, IL-7RA, PD-L1, TrkA, and IL-17A, respectively (Figure 1, Table 1). Even compared to previous designed binders that have been optimized experimentally through multiple rounds of mutation and selection, the best AlphaProteo KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}} values were still better on BHRF1, IL-7RA, PD-L1, and TrkA (Table 1, "Other design methods, optimized"). Taken together, the success rates and affinities achieved by AlphaProteo suggest that it can generate binders for many research applications after screening one round of 10-100 designs and no further experimentation.
items.zh: AlphaProteo每个靶点的最佳KD值：4个靶点<1 nM，6个靶点<10 nM，7个靶点<30 nM（图1，表1，图S3）。总体最佳KD值为82 pM，对应设计IL7RA_70（表S7，图S6）。我们识别出总共9个亚纳摩尔KD值的结合物：4个针对IL-7RA，2个针对PD-L1，1个针对TrkA，2个针对VEGF-A（表S7）。与其他设计方法的最佳未优化结合物相比，AlphaProteo在所有靶点上的KD值更好，对于BHRF1、SC2RBD、IL-7RA、PD-L1、TrkA和IL-17A分别提高了7倍、4倍、37倍、5倍、380倍和5倍（图1，表1）。即使与之前经过多轮突变和选择实验优化的设计结合物相比，AlphaProteo在BHRF1、IL-7RA、PD-L1和TrkA上的最佳KD值仍然更好（表1，“其他设计方法，优化后”）。综合来看，AlphaProteo实现的成功率和亲和力表明，在筛选一轮10-100个设计且无需进一步实验后，它可以为许多研究应用生成结合物。

items.capZh: 为了测试设计是否结合靶标上的预期表位，我们在存在已知竞争性结合剂（具有相同靶标位点）的情况下测量了结合（图2，S1节）。正如预期，所有情况下结合信号均降低，当我们的结合剂亲和力远高于竞争剂时，降低幅度较小。为了测试我们的设计是否通过预期相互作用结合靶标，我们在设计模型中突变靶标结合界面的1-3个残基后，测量了顶级结合剂的结合（图2，图S8，图S9）。几乎所有突变体的结合信号均低于其亲本，表明突变成功破坏了结合界面。少数突变体的结合信号高于亲本。这并不意外，因为我们通过视觉直觉选择突变，可能未充分考虑可能导致结合改善的结构细微之处（S1.2.2节）。总体而言，这些结果表明结合剂和靶标通过设计预期的界面相互结合。

items.en: To test whether the designs bind the intended epitope on the target, we measured binding in the presence of a known competitive binder with the same target site (Figure 2, Section S1). As expected, this reduced binding signal in all cases, with the reduction being smaller where our binders had a much higher affinity than the competitor. To test whether our designs bind their targets via the intended interactions, we measured binding of our top binders after mutating 1-3 residues at the target-binding interface in their design models (Figure 2, Figure S8, Figure S9). Almost all mutants had lower binding signal than their parent, suggesting successful disruption of the binding interface by the mutations. A small number of mutants had higher binding signal than the parent. This is not surprising given that we chose the mutations by visual intuition, which likely did not fully account for structural subtleties that could lead to improved binding (Section S1.2.2). Overall, these results indicate that both the binder and target interact with each other via the interfaces that were intended by design.
items.zh: 为了测试我们部分顶级结合剂的特异性，我们测量了它们对所有7个靶标的结合。所有测试的结合剂仅对预期靶标表现出可观察的结合（图3），但需要注意的是，对于许多下游应用，需要进行更彻底的特异性测试，例如针对所有蛋白质组靶标。

items.en: To test the specificity of a subset of our top binders, we measured their binding against all 7 targets. All binders tested exhibit observable binding only to the intended target (Figure 3), although it is important to note that for many downstream applications a more thorough test of specificity, such as against all proteomic targets, would need to be carried out.
items.zh: 我们分析了成功设计的结构多样性，以了解我们的方法能够为每个设计问题生成多少独立解决方案。多样性也具有实际重要性，因为它最大化了其中一个设计能够满足未知下游需求的机会。我们观察了每个靶标结合命中之间的成对TM分数（图S10）和二级结构含量（图S10）的分布。与RFdiffusion的活性设计相比，AlphaProteo设计彼此之间的结构相似性持续较低，并且全β结构的频率更高。这些观察结果与我们实验确认的结合剂设计的视觉检查一致，揭示了各种全α、混合α/β和全β折叠（图3）。

items.en: We analyzed the structural diversity of our successful designs to gain insight into how many independent solutions our method is able to generate for each design problem. Diversity is also practically important as it maximizes the chance that one of the designs will satisfy downstream requirements that are not known in advance. We looked at the distribution of pairwise TM-scores (Figure S10) and secondary structure content (Figure S10) across binding hits for each target. Compared to the active designs from RFdiffusion, AlphaProteo designs were consistently lower in structural similarity to each other and had a higher frequency of all-beta structures. These observations are consistent with visual inspection of our experimentally confirmed binder designs, which reveals a variety of all-alpha, mixed alpha/beta, and all-beta folds (Figure 3).
items.zh: A

items.capZh: 为了确定我们的结合剂是否表现出预期的生物活性，我们测试了它们结合并中和活SARS-CoV-2的能力。我们测试了四种结合剂（GDM_SC2BRD_11、GDM_SC2BRD_27、GDM_SC2RBD_104和GDM_SC2BRD_50）中和四种在2020年至2024年间全球流行的SARS-CoV-2变体并阻止其感染Vero细胞的能力[71]。所有四种结合剂成功中和了祖先株（hCoV19/England/02/2020），半数抑制浓度（EC50）为89-300 nM（图4，图S11）。该变体的刺突蛋白与2019年首次发现的病毒相同，并且是用于设计的靶标结构来源。这些EC50值比我们测量的体外结合亲和力高2到10倍（表S7），与临床单克隆抗体（如sotrovimab）在同一测定中观察到的结果一致（KD=0.21 nM，EC50=0.67 nM，针对单一SARS-CoV-2分离株）[71]。有趣的是，其中两种结合剂（GDM_SC2RBD_11和GDM_SC2RBD_129）能够中和三种测试变体。显示最高效力和最低EC50的结合剂（GDM_SC2RBD_50）仅抑制祖先变体。所有四种变体至少被一种设计的结合剂中和。

full.sec: 2.2 Functional and structural validation of binders
full.secZh: 2.2 结合剂的功能与结构验证

items.en: To determine if our binders exhibit the intended biological activity, we tested their ability to bind and neutralize live SARS-CoV-2. We tested four of our binders (GDM_SC2BRD_11, GDM_SC2BRD_27, GDM_SC2RBD_104 and GDM_SC2BRD_50) for the ability to neutralize four variants of SARS-CoV-2 that circulated globally from 2020 and 2024 and prevent them from infecting Vero cells [71]. All four binders successfully neutralized an ancestral strain (hCoV19/England/02/2020) with 50% inhibitory concentrations (EC50subscriptEC50\text{EC}_{50}) of 89-300 nM (Figure 4, Figure S11). This variant has an identical spike protein to the virus first identified in 2019 and is the source of the target structure used for design. These EC50subscriptEC50\text{EC}_{50} values are 2- to 10-fold higher than our measured in vitro binding affinities (Table S7), consistent to what has been observed in the same assay for clinical monoclonal antibodies such as sotrovimab (KDsubscriptKD\mathrm{K_{D}}=0.21 nM, EC50subscriptEC50\text{EC}_{50}=0.67 nM against a single SARS-CoV-2 isolate) [71]. Interestingly, two of the binders (GDM_SC2RBD_11 and GDM_SC2RBD_129) were able to neutralize three of the tested variants. The binder which showed the highest potency and lowest EC50subscriptEC50\text{EC}_{50} (GDM_SC2RBD_50) only inhibited the ancestral variant. All four variants were neutralized by at least one designed binder.
items.zh: 我们还测试了设计的结合剂GDM_VEGFA_54和GDM_VEGFA_71抑制VEGF信号传导的能力。我们测量了在用人VEGF-A刺激的原代人脐静脉内皮细胞（HUVEC）中VEGF受体2（VEGFR2）以及下游ERK和AKT激酶的磷酸化（图4）。与仅VEGF-A的对照（图4，“无抑制剂”）相比，与GDM_VEGFA_54孵育导致ERK、AKT和VEGFR2的磷酸化显著降低。这种效果类似于ki8751[25]，一种有效的小分子VEGFR2激酶抑制剂。该效果比抗VEGF-A单克隆抗体贝伐珠单抗（临床批准药物Avastin的活性成分[23]）更强，在本实验中我们以与结合剂等摩尔浓度测试了贝伐珠单抗。该浓度的贝伐珠单抗比通常在HUVEC上体外测试的浓度低1000倍[20]，表明GDM_VEGFA_54在HUVEC中是比贝伐珠单抗更有效的VEGF-A抑制剂。测试的第二种结合剂GDM_VEGFA_71导致ERK、AKT和VEGFR2磷酸化减弱，但仍可见。这些结果与我们GDM_VEGFA_54和GDM_VEGFA_71对VEGF-A的相对体外结合亲和力一致，分别为0.48和4.7 nM。

items.en: We also tested our designed binders GDM_VEGFA_54 and GDM_VEGFA_71 for their ability to inhibit VEGF signaling. We measured phosphorylation of VEGF receptor 2 (VEGFR2) and downstream ERK and AKT kinases in primary human umbilical vein endothelial cells (HUVECs) stimulated with human VEGF-A (Figure 4). Incubation with GDM_VEGFA_54 leads to substantially reduced phosphorylation of ERK, AKT, and VEGFR2 compared to a VEGF-A-only control (Figure 4, "no inhibitor"). This effect is similar to that of ki8751 [25], a potent small-molecule VEGFR2 kinase inhibitor. The effect is more potent than that of the anti-VEGF-A monoclonal antibody bevacizumab, the active component of the clinically approved drug Avastin [23], which we tested at an equimolar concentration to our binders in this experiment. This concentration of bevacizumab is 1000-fold lower than that usually tested in vitro on HUVECs [20], suggesting that GDM_VEGFA_54 is a more potent VEGF-A inhibitor than bevacizumab in HUVECs. The second binder tested, GDM_VEGFA_71, leads to a weaker, although still visible reduction in phosphorylation of ERK, AKT, and VEGFR2. These results are consistent with our relative in vitro binding affinities of GDM_VEGFA_54 and GDM_VEGFA_71 for VEGF-A, which are 0.48 and 4.7 nM, respectively.
items.zh: 为了验证我们设计的结构和结合模式，我们使用冷冻电镜（cryo-EM）获得了GDM_SC2RBD_11、GDM_SC2RBD_50、GDM_SC2RBD_104和GDM_SC2RBD_129与SARS-CoV-2刺突S1蛋白复合物的结构，分辨率为4.5-6.0 Å（图5和图S12）。实验结构紧密重现了设计的结合剂-靶标复合物，以靶标S1蛋白为对齐参考，结合剂Cα RMSD为0.84-3.14 Å。我们还获得了GDM_VEGFA_71与VEGF-A复合物的X射线晶体结构，分辨率为2.65 Å（图5）。结合剂的折叠与其设计结构极为接近，是一种混合α/β折叠，具有与VEGF-A相互作用的5股β折叠，展示了原子级精度，AF3模型与实验结构之间的Cα RMSD为0.78 Å。设计的结合方向也非常准确，靶标对齐的结合剂Cα RMSD为1.65 Å。结合剂与靶标相互作用的大多数侧链也具有正确的旋转异构体，包括结合剂组氨酸与VEGF-A酪氨酸之间的埋藏氢键，在实验结构中几乎完美重现（图5）。

items.en: To validate the structures and binding modes of our designs, we used cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) to obtain structures of GDM_SC2RBD_11, GDM_SC2RBD_50, GDM_SC2RBD_104, and GDM_SC2RBD_129 in complex with the SARS-CoV-2 spike S1 protein at 4.5 - 6.0 Å resolution (Figure 5 and Figure S12). The experimental structures closely recapitulate the designed binder-target complexes, with binder Cα𝛼\alpha RMSDs of 0.84 - 3.14 Å using the target S1 protein as an alignment reference. We additionally obtained an X-ray crystal structure of GDM_VEGFA_71 in complex with VEGF-A, at 2.65 Å resolution (Figure 5). The binder folded extremely closely to its designed structure, a mixed alpha-beta fold with a 5-strand beta sheet interacting with VEGF-A, demonstrating atomic level accuracy that shows a Cα𝛼\alpha RMSD of 0.78 Å between AF3 model and experimental structure. The designed binding orientation was also highly accurate, with a target-aligned binder Cα𝛼\alpha RMSD of 1.65 Å. Most sidechains of the binder interacting with the target also had the correct rotamer, including a buried hydrogen bond between a histidine of the binder and a tyrosine of VEGF-A which was recapitulated almost perfectly in the experimental structure (Figure 5).
items.zh: A

items.capZh: 我们的结果表明，AlphaProteo能够在单轮中等通量测试后，为多种靶标生成低至亚纳摩尔级的结合剂。这些结合剂体积小（5-15 kDa）、热稳定性高且表达量高，因此可能已经适用于某些研究应用，无需进一步优化。然而，需要注意的是，我们在本工作中实验验证的靶标相对较少，并且所有结合剂均使用靶标晶体结构作为输入进行设计。我们希望进一步提高AlphaProteo的性能，并扩展其能力以解决更广泛的结合剂设计问题，包括具有挑战性的靶标（如TNFα）以及缺乏实验结构或单一明确构象的靶标。我们相信AlphaProteo将为许多生物学应用解锁新的解决方案，例如控制细胞信号传导、对蛋白质、细胞和组织进行成像、为各种效应系统赋予靶标特异性等。

items.en: Our results show that AlphaProteo is capable of generating low- to sub-nanomolar binders for a diverse range of targets after a single round of medium-throughput testing. The binders are small (5-15 kDa), thermostable, and highly expressed, and therefore potentially already suitable for use in some research applications without further optimization. However, it is important to note that we have experimentally validated relatively few targets in this work, and all our binders are designed using a target crystal structure as input. We hope to further improve AlphaProteo’s performance and expand its capabilities to address a wider range of binder design problems, including challenging targets such as TNFα𝛼\alpha as well as those which lack experimental structures or a single well-defined conformation. We believe that AlphaProteo will unlock new solutions for many biological applications, such as controlling cell signaling, imaging proteins, cells, and tissues, conferring target specificity to various effector systems, and beyond.
items.zh: 本报告内容仅供研究目的，不用于临床。由于生物安全和商业考虑，本报告未包含机器学习方法。我们致力于为社区开发安全且负责任的蛋白质设计方案，并参考我们在生物安全方面的工作和咨询。

items.en: The contents of this report are intended for research purposes only, and not for clinical use. This report does not include machine learning methods due to biosecurity and commercial considerations. We are looking to develop a safe and responsible protein design offering for the community, informed by our work and consultations on biosecurity and safety.

The authors would like to thank the following people for their input and feedback: Jonas Adler, Andy Ballard, Charlie Beattie, David Belanger, Lucy Colwell, Andrew Cowie, Sarah Elwes, Richard Evans, Conor Griffin, John Jumper, Svend Kjær, Antonia Paterson, Matteo Perino, Francesca Pietra, Uchechi Okereke, Olaf Ronneberger, Freyr Sverrisson, Nick Swanson, Kathryn Tunyasuvunakool, Augustin Žídek. We would also like to thank Dane Wittrup (Dept. of Chemical Engineering, Massachusetts Institute of Technology) for his generous gift of yeast vector pCTcon2 and Svend Kjær (Structural Biology Science Technology Platform, The Francis Crick Institute) for his production of the SARS-CoV-2 spike protein.
items.zh: 作者感谢以下人员的意见和反馈：Jonas Adler、Andy Ballard、Charlie Beattie、David Belanger、Lucy Colwell、Andrew Cowie、Sarah Elwes、Richard Evans、Conor Griffin、John Jumper、Svend Kjær、Antonia Paterson、Matteo Perino、Francesca Pietra、Uchechi Okereke、Olaf Ronneberger、Freyr Sverrisson、Nick Swanson、Kathryn Tunyasuvunakool、Augustin Žídek。我们还要感谢Dane Wittrup（麻省理工学院化学工程系）慷慨赠送的酵母载体pCTcon2，以及Svend Kjær（弗朗西斯·克里克研究所结构生物学科学技术平台）生产的SARS-CoV-2刺突蛋白。

items.en: Machine learning model development, generation of design candidates, experimental success rate, experimental binding affinity measurements, and VEGF-A binder crystal structure determination were performed by Google DeepMind.
items.zh: 机器学习模型开发、设计候选物生成、实验成功率、实验结合亲和力测量以及VEGF-A结合物晶体结构测定由Google DeepMind完成。

items.en: Cell-based assays and cryo-EM structure determination were performed by research groups at The Francis Crick Institute, London, UK.
items.zh: 基于细胞的测定和冷冻电镜结构测定由英国伦敦弗朗西斯·克里克研究所的研究小组完成。
